PT Master Print Tbk. Management Performance Management Company Corporate Sustainability Discussion & Overview Report Profile Governance Report Analysis Penjualan Neto Net Sales Perseroan mencatatkan penjualan neto sebesar Rp128,82 The Company recorded net sales of Rp128.82 billion in miliar di tahun 2024, meningkat sebesar 30,93% atau 2024, an increase of 30.93% or Rp30.43 billion compared setara Rp30,43 miliar, dibandingkan tahun 2023 yang to Rp98.39 billion in 2023. This growth was driven by a tercatat sebesar Rp98,39 miliar. Kondisi ini disebabkan oleh 31.87% increase in consumables sales. meningkatnya penjualan consumabel sebesar 31,87%.
